projects.title: On-Demand Drone Security Patrol System for Bosques de las Lomas
projects.titleEs: Sistema de Patrullaje de Seguridad con Drones para Bosques de las Lomas
projects.summary: Deploy a community-managed autonomous drone security system allowing residents to request aerial patrols via mobile app. Professional-grade GPS-guided drones with terrain mapping capabilities will provide rapid response security surveillance across Bosques de las Lomas streets and common areas, maintaining proper flight altitudes automatically. The system includes AFAC-compliant autonomous flight operations, secure data storage in Mexico, and integration with existing neighborhood security infrastructure. Residents can request drone dispatch to their location or follow suspicious activity, with all footage stored according to INAI privacy regulations and accessible to authorized community security coordinators.
projects.summaryEs: Sistema autónomo de vigilancia con drones administrado por la comunidad. Los residentes pueden solicitar patrullas aéreas desde una app. Drones GPS de grado profesional con mapeo de terreno ofrecerán respuesta rápida en calles y áreas comunes de Bosques de las Lomas. El sistema incluye operaciones autónomas homologadas por la AFAC, almacenamiento seguro de datos en México e integración con la infraestructura de seguridad vecinal existente. Las grabaciones se almacenan conforme al reglamento de privacidad de la INAI y son accesibles para los coordinadores de seguridad autorizados.

milestones.title: Regulatory Compliance and Permits
milestones.description: Obtain AFAC autonomous drone operation permits, liability insurance, and SEDUVI approvals for GPS-guided drone operations over Bosques de las Lomas residential areas
milestones.descriptionEs: Obtener permisos AFAC para operación autónoma de drones, seguro de responsabilidad civil y aprobaciones SEDUVI para vuelos GPS sobre zonas residenciales de Bosques de las Lomas

milestones.title: Hardware and Mapping Infrastructure
milestones.description: Purchase GPS-guided autonomous drones with HD cameras and terrain mapping capabilities. Configure flight control systems with Bosques de las Lomas geographical data and establish charging stations
milestones.descriptionEs: Adquirir drones autónomos guiados por GPS con cámaras HD y capacidades de mapeo de terreno. Configurar sistemas de control de vuelo con datos geográficos de Bosques de las Lomas y establecer estaciones de carga

milestones.title: App Development and Data Infrastructure
milestones.titleEs: Desarrollo de App e Infraestructura de Datos
milestones.description: Build resident-facing mobile app with integrated orientation tutorial for drone requests and secure Mexican data center infrastructure for INAI-compliant video storage and access controls
milestones.descriptionEs: Desarrollar app móvil para residentes con tutorial integrado para solicitar drones, e infraestructura de centro de datos en México para almacenamiento de video conforme a la INAI

milestones.title: Community Integration and Launch
milestones.description: Train community security coordinators, install privacy signage throughout the colonia, and launch autonomous pilot operations with community testing
milestones.descriptionEs: Capacitar a los coordinadores de seguridad comunitaria, instalar señalética de privacidad en la colonia y lanzar operaciones piloto autónomas con pruebas comunitarias

requiredRoles.description: Navigate autonomous drone registration and flight permits with Mexican aviation authorities for GPS-guided operations
Procure and configure GPS-guided drones with terrain mapping, autonomous flight controls, and security camera systems for residential surveillance

requiredRoles.role: Mobile App Developer with Tutorial Integration
requiredRoles.description: Build iOS/Android app with built-in orientation tutorial for drone dispatch requests, live video feeds, and resident authentication with bilingual interface
Ensure INAI compliance for video recording, establish data retention policies, and draft resident privacy agreements for autonomous drone surveillance
Train residents and security personnel on autonomous drone operations, establish dispatch protocols, and manage integration with existing neighborhood security systems
Oversee procurement compliance including 3-quote vendor selection, verify SAT status of contractors, and manage milestone-based payment disbursements

projects.title: Paseo de las Palmas Lighting Upgrade
projects.titleEs: Modernización de Alumbrado en Paseo de las Palmas
projects.summary: Replace 40 sodium streetlights with LED fixtures along Paseo de las Palmas.
projects.summaryEs: Sustitución de 40 lámparas de sodio por luminarias LED a lo largo del Paseo de las Palmas.

milestones.title: Permits & Design
milestones.description: Obtain municipal permits and finalize LED specs.
milestones.descriptionEs: Obtener permisos municipales y definir las especificaciones de las luminarias LED.

milestones.title: Testing & Handoff
milestones.description: Commission and hand off to colonia.
milestones.descriptionEs: Puesta en marcha y entrega a la colonia.

services.name: Custom Software Development
services.description: Full-stack software development covering web applications, mobile apps, data analysis systems, and AI solutions. Handles complete project lifecycle from consultation and planning through development, testing, and deployment.
services.typicalPriceMxn: $50 USD per hour (~950 MXN/hr), flexible project-based pricing
